name: Blueberry Cream Cheese Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Adjust oven rack to the middle position.
2. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
3. Line a muffin tin with 12 paper liners. Set aside.
4. In a mixing bowl, combine flour, sugar, baking powder, baking soda, and salt. Stir well; set aside.
5. Using the metal blade of a food processor, process cream cheese, lemon juice, and vanilla until smooth.
6. Add eggs to the food processor and pulse for 15 seconds.
7. Scrape down the side of the container with a spatula. With the processor running, pour hot melted butter through the food chute within 10 seconds. Pulse another 10 seconds.
8. Add milk and pulse for 5 seconds.
9. Add the dry ingredients to the food processor and mix with 4 to 6 half-second pulses until all are incorporated into batter.
10. Add blueberries and mix until all are incorporated into the batter, usually with 3 or 4 half-second pulses (or use a spoon to fold them in if you prefer your berries whole).
11. Pour an equal amount of batter into each muffin cup, filling each about 3/4 full.
12. Bake for 30 minutes. Cool on a rack for 15 minutes.
13. Makes 12 muffins.
